meta.title: Refinance in Miami & Florida | Ingrid Ascanio
meta.description: Refinance with Miami broker Ingrid Ascanio: honest math on a lower payment, a shorter term, or cash out. If keeping your current loan wins, she says so.

hero.title: A refinance is math, not marketing.
hero.body: Whatever your goal, I'll model the real numbers — the true monthly change, the actual cost, and the honest break-even point. If the math says keep your current loan, that's exactly what I'll tell you.

items.name: Lower the monthly payment
items.desc: When rates move or your credit has improved since you closed, the same house can cost less every month. The question is whether savings outrun the cost of refinancing — I'll show you the break-even month, not just the new payment.
items.detail: Best when: rates have dropped since your loan, your credit score has climbed, or you're shedding FHA mortgage insurance by moving to conventional.

items.name: Shorten the term
items.desc: Trading a 30-year for a 15- or 20-year usually raises the payment a little and cuts total interest a lot. If your income has grown into the higher payment, the long-term math can be dramatic.
items.detail: Best when: your income is stronger than when you bought, retirement has a date on it, or the interest column of your statement bothers you.

items.name: Put equity to work
items.desc: South Florida owners are often sitting on serious equity. A cash-out refinance can consolidate expensive debt, fund a renovation, or seed an investment — against your home's value, at mortgage pricing.
items.detail: Best when: you're carrying high-interest debt, funding a project with real return, or buying your next property. Not for: vacations. I'll be honest about that too.

items.name: The numbers call
items.desc: Current balance, payment, goal. Ten minutes and I'll know whether a refi deserves a deeper look.

items.name: The honest model
items.desc: New payment, closing costs, break-even month, lifetime interest — side by side with doing nothing.

items.name: Close in weeks
items.desc: No house hunt, no sellers. A clean refi typically moves from application to closing in three to five weeks.

cta.title: Ten minutes tells you if the math works.
cta.body: Bring your current statement. I'll bring the honest model — including the version where you change nothing.
